overview: Provides for payment of statutory bonus to eligible employees employed in establishments covered under the Act.

definitions.definition: Employee eligible under the Payment of Bonus Act.
Accounting year as defined under the Act.
Salary or wage as defined under the Act.

rules.title: Review Bonus Applicability
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment falls within the scope of the Payment of Bonus Act.

rules.title: Identify Eligible Employees
rules.description: Determine employee eligibility for statutory bonus in accordance with applicable provisions.

rules.title: Calculate Statutory Bonus
rules.description: Calculate bonus payable using the statutory formula and applicable limits.

rules.title: Disburse Bonus Within Prescribed Timeline
rules.description: Ensure statutory bonus is paid within the prescribed timelines.

rules.title: Maintain Bonus Registers
rules.description: Maintain statutory records relating to bonus computation and payment.

exceptions.title: Eligibility Conditions
exceptions.description: Bonus eligibility depends upon the provisions of the Act including salary limits, qualifying service and other statutory conditions.
